conflict: The visible human cost of Hoarded exploitation rendered through bureaucratic absurdity; Kem's restraint lesson colliding with moral necessity
consequence: The moral weight of the Ledger system becomes concrete through dark comedy; the Scour identified; Kem's 98-level spending spree dramatizes the cost of conscience; Dren makes his first non-transactional choice
must_land_beats: The Margins as exploited territory — indentured labor, debt-spending, depleted communities — rendered through bureaucratic dark comedy: Productivity Tiers, 'Renewable Expenditure Units,' interest rates on ability-debt
Fallow's unsentimental, darkly funny testimony: 'They called it a Development Opportunity. Thirty years of development. Very developed.'
The Scour identified as the threshold's geographic location

Kem's major spending: healing a sick child (8 levels), breaking an enforcement mechanism (20 levels), combat with enforcers (35 levels), helping repair infrastructure (15 levels), smaller interventions (20 levels) — 148 to 50, every spend dramatized as a moral choice
Vel watching Kem burn through her cascade budget and unable to tell him to stop, because stopping is what the Hoarded do
Maren's route journal consulted for the path to the Scour — Maren came through this region
pressure_source: The visible human cost of Hoarded exploitation rendered through bureaucratic absurdity; Kem's restraint lesson colliding with moral necessity
secondary_character_beats: Dren's silence speaks — a man at 130 looking at people at 4 and doing subtraction on his own life; he decides to continue for non-transactional reasons after watching Kem spend for strangers
Fallow's account is matter-of-fact: they have seen people vanish and it is another thing that happens to people nobody protects

setups_to_plant.description: The Margins' moral reality — involuntary depletion, systemic exploitation — becomes a pressure that contaminates subsequent confrontations. Vel's heroic-spending narrative and Kem's liberation-through-burning narrative are both complicated.

state_shift: The moral weight of the Ledger system becomes concrete through dark comedy; the Scour identified; Kem's 98-level spending spree dramatizes the cost of conscience; Dren makes his first non-transactional choice
